Class Player

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MovingEntity
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player
public class Player extends MovingEntity
Represents the main player character in the game. The player can move, collect coins, take damage, heal, and check for collisions with the game environment.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class MovingEntity

    sprite, x, y

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Player(Position startPos, int maxHealth, GamePanel gp)
    Constructs a Player object with a specified starting position and maximum health.
    Player(Position startPos, GamePanel gp)
    Constructs a Player object with a default maximum health of 6.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    checkCollision()
    Performs tile-based collision checking by predicting the player's next position and checking the map tiles at the corners of the player's solid area.
    void
    collectCoin()
    Increments the count of coins collected by the player.
    void
    draw(Graphics2D g2)
    Draws the player character and the health bar (hearts) on the screen.
    int
    getCoinCount()
    Gets the total number of coins the player has collected.
    int
    getCoinsCollected()
    Gets the total number of coins collected by the player.
    Direction
    getDirection()
    Gets the player's current facing direction.
    int
    getHealth()
    Gets the player's current health value.
    int
    getMaxHealth()
    Gets the player's maximum health value.
    void
    getPlayerImage()
    Loads the player's animation sprite images from resources.
    Position
    getPosition()
    Gets the current pixel position of the player on the map.
    Rectangle
    getSolidArea()
    Gets the collision detection bounding box area.
    int
    getSpeed()
    Gets the player's movement speed.
    int
    getSpriteNum()
    Gets the current sprite frame number for animation (1 or 2).
    void
    heal(int amount)
    Increases the player's health by the specified amount, preventing health from exceeding max health.
    boolean
    isAlive()
    Checks if the player is still alive (health is greater than zero).
    boolean
    isCollisionOn()
    Checks if the player is currently blocked by a collision.
    void
    loadHeartImages()
    Loads the full and empty heart images for the health display.
    void
    move(Direction direction)
    Attempts to move the player in the specified direction by the player's speed.
    void
    resetState()
    Resets the player's health to max health and coin count to zero.
    void
    setDirection(Direction direction)
    Sets the player's current facing direction.
    void
    setPosition(Position position)
    Sets the player's current pixel position on the map.
    void
    setSpeed(int speed)
    Sets the player's movement speed.
    void
    setSpriteNum(int spriteNum)
    Sets the current sprite frame number for animation.
    void
    takeDamage(int amount)
    Decreases the player's health by the specified amount, preventing health from going below zero.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a string representation of the player's current state.
    void
    update()
    Updates the player's state based on input, animation, and collision detection.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(Position startPos, GamePanel gp)
      Constructs a Player object with a default maximum health of 6.
      Parameters:
      startPos - The initial position of the player on the map.
      gp - The GamePanel instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if startPos is null.

    • Player

      public Player(Position startPos, int maxHealth, GamePanel gp)
      Constructs a Player object with a specified starting position and maximum health. Initializes health, coins, direction, and collision area.
      Parameters:
      startPos - The initial position of the player on the map.
      maxHealth - The maximum health value for the player.
      gp - The GamePanel instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if startPos is null or maxHealth is not positive.

  • Method Details

    • getDirection

      public Direction getDirection()
      Gets the player's current facing direction.
      Returns:
      The current Direction enum value.

    • setDirection

      public void setDirection(Direction direction)
      Sets the player's current facing direction.
      Parameters:
      direction - The new Direction enum value.

    • getSpriteNum

      public int getSpriteNum()
      Gets the current sprite frame number for animation (1 or 2).
      Returns:
      The current sprite number.

    • setSpriteNum

      public void setSpriteNum(int spriteNum)
      Sets the current sprite frame number for animation.
      Parameters:
      spriteNum - The new sprite number (typically 1 or 2).

    • getSpeed

      public int getSpeed()
      Gets the player's movement speed.
      Returns:
      The speed in pixels per frame.

    • setSpeed

      public void setSpeed(int speed)
      Sets the player's movement speed.
      Parameters:
      speed - The new speed in pixels per frame (must be positive).

    • getSolidArea

      public Rectangle getSolidArea()
      Gets the collision detection bounding box area.
      Returns:
      The Rectangle representing the solid area.

    • isCollisionOn

      public boolean isCollisionOn()
      Checks if the player is currently blocked by a collision.
      Returns:
      true if collision is detected, false otherwise.

    • move

      public void move(Direction direction)
      Attempts to move the player in the specified direction by the player's speed. Movement is constrained by the game boundaries.
      Parameters:
      direction - The direction to move (UP, DOWN, LEFT, or RIGHT).

    • update

      public void update()
      Updates the player's state based on input, animation, and collision detection. Handles movement and sprite cycling for animation.

    • collectCoin

      public void collectCoin()
      Increments the count of coins collected by the player.

    • getCoinCount

      public int getCoinCount()
      Gets the total number of coins the player has collected.
      Returns:
      The current coin count.

    • takeDamage

      public void takeDamage(int amount)
      Decreases the player's health by the specified amount, preventing health from going below zero.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of damage to take.

    • heal

      public void heal(int amount)
      Increases the player's health by the specified amount, preventing health from exceeding max health.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of health to restore.

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Checks if the player is still alive (health is greater than zero).
      Returns:
      true if health > 0, false otherwise.

    • resetState

      public void resetState()
      Resets the player's health to max health and coin count to zero.

    • getPosition

      public Position getPosition()
      Gets the current pixel position of the player on the map.
      Returns:
      The player's current Position object.

    • setPosition

      public void setPosition(Position position)
      Sets the player's current pixel position on the map.
      Parameters:
      position - The new Position object for the player.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if position is null.

    • getHealth

      public int getHealth()
      Gets the player's current health value.
      Returns:
      The current health.

    • getMaxHealth

      public int getMaxHealth()
      Gets the player's maximum health value.
      Returns:
      The maximum health.

    • getCoinsCollected

      public int getCoinsCollected()
      Gets the total number of coins collected by the player.
      Returns:
      The number of coins collected.

    • getPlayerImage

      public void getPlayerImage()
      Loads the player's animation sprite images from resources.

    • loadHeartImages

      public void loadHeartImages()
      Loads the full and empty heart images for the health display.

    • checkCollision

      public void checkCollision()
      Performs tile-based collision checking by predicting the player's next position and checking the map tiles at the corners of the player's solid area.

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics2D g2)
      Draws the player character and the health bar (hearts) on the screen.
      Parameters:
      g2 - The Graphics2D context used for drawing.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the player's current state.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A string containing position, health, max health, and coins collected.
